package rulecoverage

func NegativePanicForExpectedErrors() string {
    ruleID := "panic_for_expected_errors"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`panic()` used for expected error conditions like invalid input or missing config"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
